title: nie-matrix: Matrix/Element bridge
description: Bridge bot that connects nie rooms to Matrix/Element rooms. The bot speaks the Matrix application service API and relays messages bidirectionally. Users on either side can participate without adopting the same client.
close_reason: Superseded by nie-c8bb: nie-bridge-matrix crate implemented with full bidirectional bridge loop, config, MatrixClient, AS HTTP server. Committed in feat(bridge): add nie-bridge-matrix crate.
